title: alpinia globosa
intro: Alpinia globosa, also known as the rose ginger or shell ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, Zingiberaceae. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpinia globosa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, among others. Alpinia globosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
